3247480.name: Super Ricko's Odyssey
3247480.description:
An open world 3D platformer-collectathon with dynamic movement controls. Explore and jump your way across different worlds as you master the controls to perform different movement combos and collect all the cores and coins!

Inspired by Super Mario Odyssey's movement, you have 3 different movement action buttons: jump, dash, and force. Then by combing those together, you can perform 6 other different move combos to traverse the world and platform your way around in the most dynamic and satisfying way possible. We've made sure that the movement in the game is as fun as possible.

  • Extremely fun and satisfying movement once controls are mastered.

  • Explore different open worlds to collect cores & coins.

  • Xbox controller or keyboard & mouse support.
